title: Ultimate Enchants
description: Adds multiple new enchants to vanilla minecraft!
body:
# **Ultimate Enchants**
![A small library.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44c38c4fc8d3a80f9dc05174d1f0bb4f59cad830.png)
# 
**Ultimate Enchants** is a datapack for 1.21+ that adds multiple new enchantments and slightly reworks old ones

# New Enchants

<details>
<summary>Bolt</summary>
  Bolt is an enchant for bows with a max level of 1.  Arrows shot from bows with Bolt will summon a lightning bolt when it hits a mob or a block.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Vision</summary>
  Vision is an enchant for helmets with a max level of 1. When wearing a Vision helmet in the night or in caves, you will be given the night vision effect.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Mining Profiency</summary>
Mining Profiency is an enchant for every weapon with a max level of 10. When mining ores with a tool with Mining Profiency, you will gain more EXP than usual
</details>
<details>
<summary>Combat Mastery</summary>
Combat Mastery is an enchant for every weapon with a max level of 10. When killing a mob using an Combat Mastery weapon, you will gain more EXP than usual
</details>
<details>
<summary>Frost Aspect</summary>
Frost Aspect is an enchant for everything that can have Fire Aspect with a max level of 2. You can slow down enemies by attacking them with Frost Aspect
</details>
<details>
<summary>Strolling</summary>
Strolling is an enchant for boots with a max level of 3. It increases the max ammount of blocks you can step on without jumping.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Skipping</summary>
Skipping is an enchant for boots with a max level of 3. Level 1 will allow you to jump over fences. Max Skipping allows you to jump 5 blocks in the air.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Scorch</summary>
Scorch is an enchant for chestplates with a max level of 3. When equipped, it has a chance to burn mobs that attack you.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Weightless</summary>
Weightless is an enchant for the Elytra. It decreases gravity by 75% when equipped.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Curse of Lightning</summary>
Curse of Lightning is a curse where the you will get struck by lightning every few seconds.
</details>
Conquering
Vanquishing

# Reworks
**Coming soon**
- Nerf to Protection. It now doesn't protect from every damage type
- Nerf to Sharpness. It now deals less damage compared to other 'damage' enchantments
- Buff to Bane of Arthropods. Experience from killing 'arthropods' is increased when killed with Bane of Arthropods
